## [00:00 - 03:03]

Okay, this is going to be how we grade the closers and setters. So for a closer, someone who's an A player, typically they're going to have a ton of sales experience. They show up to the call very professional. And when I say professional, I don't exactly mean they're wearing a suit and tie. You know, if they do that, then yeah, it's pretty professional. But I mean, they show up with pen and paper. You know, they're in a proper, the proper setting, you know, they show up at a laptop. The lighting isn't weird. They're dressed appropriately. That's that's professional, I guess, in the online space, you know, just showing up appropriate to the call. Showing up on time early, you know, a few minutes early already in the waiting room. That's professional. You know, they could even be wearing a hat. That's totally fine. Like a backwards hat. That's what Mitchell does on our team sometimes. Okay, and they got to have really good energy, great attitude. Now there are some people who are a little more laid back, but you can still sense the energy on the call. Like they may be talking a little more chill, they may not be all bubbly and whatnot, but good energy isn't really, I don't mean that you have to be like super hyped. You know, if they do have that, then that's good. But if they don't, it's more in like the words they're saying and the impact of the words have can also display some good energy and whatnot. And yeah, attitude as well. It's got to be really good. Got to be a very positive person. No pessimistic people. They got to be very personal, meaning they got to be easy to talk to. Like you got to be wanting to keep talking to them. Okay, you know, it can't be awkward at all. They got to be very easy to talk to you, very personable, make you feel comfortable on the call. Okay, for a minus, they got to have, you know, they don't have to have a ton of sales experience, a decent amount of sales experience, which by the way, if they have experience in the online space, that's a huge plus. So decent amount of sales experience. Again, you got to show professional. They got to have solid energy. They got to have good attitude and they got to be personal, you know, and the thing about these two, they got to understand the online space as well.
